About.metaTitle: About IVF Master - Care, Clarity & Reproductive Medicine
About.metaDescription: Meet the doctors and care team behind IVF Master and learn how listening, education and evidence shape each fertility journey.

Contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with IVF Master fertility clinic in Sangli, Maharashtra.
Contact.headline: Let's start with a conversation.
Contact.lead: You don't need to have all the answers. Just share a little about where you are — and we'll take it from there, gently.
Contact.formDurationLabel: How long have you been trying?
Contact.formContactLabel: How would you like us to reach you?
Contact.formMessageLabel: Anything you'd like us to know?

Contact.panelWhatsappSub: We'll reply as soon as we can

Team.metaDescription: Meet the experienced fertility specialists at IVF Master, Sangli.

Hero.headline: Trying to conceive is rarely simple.
Hero.subheadline: Understanding why doesn't have to be.
Hero.body: At IVF Master, we guide every couple with honest answers, unhurried consultations, and a care plan built around your specific situation — not a protocol.
Hero.ctaMicroTrust: A calm, unhurried conversation about your situation — no pressure to proceed.

PainRecognition.headline: You've been carrying this quietly for a long time.
PainRecognition.body: The waiting, the questions, the hope that keeps starting over. We understand — and you don't have to carry it alone anymore.

WhyTrust.heading: Trust isn't claimed. It's earned, quietly, over time.
WhyTrust.body: For over twenty years, couples have walked in carrying fear — and walked out with clarity. This is the conversation that changes everything.

card0.label: What couples fear
card0.worry: Will we just be another case on a conveyor belt?
card0.response: Never. Your first visit isn't a verdict — it's a conversation. We listen to your whole story before we say a single word about treatment.

card1.label: What couples dread
card1.worry: We won't understand anything they tell us.
card1.response: You'll understand every step before it happens. No jargon, no feeling lost — because understanding is what quietens fear.

card2.label: What couples need
card2.worry: Just tell us the truth — even if it's hard.
card2.response: Always. We won't inflate your chances to win your trust. You'll get the real picture, with compassion — hope built on honesty, never pressure.

WhyTrust.gestosisNote: Our lead specialist developed the HDP Gestosis Score — now adopted by India's National Health Mission.
WhyTrust.ctaSub: An unhurried first visit to understand your story.

CostOfWaiting.line1: It rarely feels like a decision.
CostOfWaiting.line3: Then next year becomes the year after.
CostOfWaiting.line5: is that time is the one thing fertility can’t give back.
CostOfWaiting.hopeLine2: Understanding sooner simply gives you more of your story to write.
CostOfWaiting.closeBody: Wherever you are in your journey, it’s not too late to understand it.
CostOfWaiting.ctaSub: An honest, unhurried look at where you stand.

UnderstandingIVF.heading: What happens, step by step — and why.
UnderstandingIVF.body: IVF can feel overwhelming from the outside. Here are the six steps as they actually unfold, in plain language.

stimulation.heading: Preparing your body
stimulation.body: A gentle head start. Light medication helps your ovaries prepare more eggs than usual, with care at every check-in.

retrieval.heading: Collecting the eggs
retrieval.body: A short, calm procedure under anesthesia. The matured eggs are gently collected — most people feel only mild discomfort.

fertilisation.heading: Egg meets sperm
fertilisation.body: In the lab, egg and sperm are brought together — the quiet beginning of a possible embryo.

culture.heading: The embryo grows
culture.body: Over a few days, embryos develop under close watch, and the healthiest is chosen with care.

transfer.heading: The transfer
transfer.body: A quick, painless step. The embryo is gently placed in the womb — no anesthesia, no bed rest needed.

wait.heading: The wait, together
wait.body: About two weeks until the test. The hardest wait — and the one we walk through with you.

UnderstandingIVF.closeBody: By the time treatment begins, you’ll understand every step — and that clarity changes everything.

MythsFacts.heading: The questions almost everyone asks.
MythsFacts.body: If something here has been on your mind, you’re not alone — these are the things couples ask us most. Honest answers, in plain language.

q1.q: Are IVF babies as healthy as other babies?
q1.a: Yes. Millions of healthy children have been born through IVF worldwide. An IVF baby is just as healthy — and just as loved — as any other.

q2.a: Not anymore. We usually transfer a single healthy embryo, so most IVF pregnancies are a single baby.

q3.a: Most people feel only mild discomfort. The egg-collection step is done under anesthesia, so you won’t feel pain during it.

q4.q: Is IVF only about the woman?
q4.a: No. Fertility challenges are just as often related to the man — or both partners. We look at the whole picture, together, without blame.

q5.a: It’s one of the most important factors — which is exactly why understanding your options early gives you the most choices. But every story is different, and 40 is not a closed door.

q6.q: Do I need complete bed rest after the embryo transfer?
q6.a: No. Normal daily life is safe. We may simply ask you to avoid heavy lifting or intense exercise for a short while.

q7.a: With a conversation — no commitment. We listen to your story, answer your questions, and only then talk about what (if anything) comes next.

MythsFacts.closeBody: Still wondering about something? The best answers are the ones about your situation.

PatientJourney.heading: From the first question to the last step — with you.
PatientJourney.body: This is how the journey unfolds when care comes first — one step at a time, in plain language, at your pace.

s1.heading: An unhurried first conversation
s1.body: We listen to your whole story before we say a single word about treatment. No hurry, no judgement.

s2.heading: Careful, thorough evaluation
s2.body: The right tests, thoughtfully chosen. We look at the whole picture — medical, emotional, personal — before drawing any conclusions.

s3.heading: Your results in plain language
s3.body: We explain what we found, what it means, and what your options are — in words you can actually understand.

s4.heading: A plan built around you
s4.body: Together, we shape a path that fits your goals, your timeline, and your life — not a protocol off a shelf.

s5.heading: Precise, supported treatment
s5.body: When the time comes, we move with care and expertise. Nothing happens without your full understanding and readiness.

s6.heading: With you, however it unfolds
s6.body: Wherever the journey leads, we stay — not just for outcomes, but for every moment of uncertainty along the way.

PatientJourney.closeBody: By the time treatment begins, you understand everything that’s happening and why. That clarity changes everything.

MeetTheDoctors.heading: You won’t be a case number here.
MeetTheDoctors.body: For over twenty years, two doctors — and a marriage — have devoted themselves to one thing: helping couples become parents, with honesty and care. Meet the people who’ll walk beside you.
MeetTheDoctors.gorakhEssence: The doctor who explains until it finally makes sense.
MeetTheDoctors.gorakhIntro: Gorakh believes no one should feel lost in their own treatment. He’ll sit with you, draw the picture, and answer every question — twice if you need — until the fear gives way to understanding.
MeetTheDoctors.gorakhCred4: Developed the HDP Gestosis Score — adopted by India’s National Health Mission
MeetTheDoctors.saieEssence: Gentle with people, fierce about their care.
MeetTheDoctors.saieIntro: Saie looks after the moments that matter most — the high-risk, the delicate, the frightening. Couples remember how calm she makes them feel when it counts.
MeetTheDoctors.saieCred2: 20+ years in high-risk obstetrics & reproductive medicine
MeetTheDoctors.coupleNote: Married for over twenty years — and partners in every couple’s care.

SuccessStories.heading: What patients say
SuccessStories.body: These aren’t selected quotes. These are real people who came to us scared, and left with their families complete.

FinalCTA.headline: Ready to talk? Let’s start with understanding.
FinalCTA.body: You don’t have to decide anything today. Visit us, call, or message — we’ll explain everything, gently, before anything begins.

Footer.tagline: Premium fertility care, with compassion — guiding couples toward parenthood.

Procedures.hubHeading: Every path to parenthood, in plain language.
Procedures.hubBody: You may have heard these names from a doctor or a friend. Here’s what each one really means — gently, and without the jargon.
Procedures.hubCloseText: Not sure which path is yours? That’s exactly what a first conversation is for.
